steps.title: Find the median position
steps.content: There are $27$ fish, so the median is the $\frac{27+1}{2}=14$th value when the weights are ordered.

steps.title: Locate the 14th fish
steps.content: The $8$ fish in tank A are positions $1$ through $8$. The $9$ fish in tank B are positions $9$ through $17$. Therefore the $14$th fish is in tank B.

steps.title: Match the possible weight
steps.content: Tank B fish weigh at least $6$ ounces and no more than $14$ ounces. Of the choices, only $10$ is in that range, so B is correct.
